intent.narrative: Riya Mate is an entry-level Software Developer and AI Engineer based in California, open to remote opportunities, and currently on F1 OPT work authorization.
intent.futurePreferences: Open to relocation and seeking opportunities for salary growth.

plans.label: Date posted
plans.reason: Narrow date windows miss most of the job inventory.

plans.label: Work model
plans.reason: A single work-model filter cuts the candidate pool by ~60%.

plans.label: Years of experience
plans.reason: Widening the YoE band by 2 on each side catches adjacent postings.
